Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses Of Plaintiff Rita J. Hilliard To Special Interrogatories, Set One
Off Calendar Sep-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lauren Rose, Esq. of Santana, Tcheng, Vierra & Symonds, Tel. 415.777.1308 x16054, for defendants and moving party;
No other appearance.

Defendants' counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT HYATT HOTELS CORPORATION, CHSP TRS FISHERMAN WHARF, LLC's Motion To Compel Responses Of Plaintiff Rita J. Hilliard To Special Interrogatories, Set One, as follows: NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED TO THESE THREE MOTIONS TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES; ACCORDINGLY, THEY WILL BE GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WILL BE ORDERED TO PROVIDE WITHIN TWENTY (20) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES, WTHOUT OBJECTION, TO DEFENDANT HYATT HOTELS CORPORATION, CHSP TRS FISHERMANS WHARF'S (1) SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; (2) REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND (3) FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1500.00 WILL BE ASSESSED AS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND PAID TO DEFENDANT WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. Order signed in open court. [One order was signed for the 3 motions.] Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
